data.title: Inns of Monterey in Monterey, Calif. is offering free night stays this holiday season at its boutique hotels.
data.description: Experience the enchanting holiday spirit in Monterey, California this year! Inns of Monterey is inviting guests to enjoy a special package at their boutique hotels, including Casa Munras. This offer is available starting on December 11, 2025. Come and delight in the festive atmosphere and the allure of the coast during this magical season.

data.title: Wellness company Dialed Moods has launched sea moss gummies for $29.99 and shilajit gummies for $34.99.
data.description: A health and wellness company based in Costa Mesa, California called Dialed Moods has recently launched two new all-natural gummy products. These products include sea moss and shilajit gummies aimed at helping individuals improve their daily wellness routines. The sea moss gummies are priced at $29.99 for a 60-gummy jar, while the shilajit gummies are priced at $34.99 for the same quantity. Customers can purchase these products both online and at specific retail locations.

data.title: Aramark (NYSE:ARMK) reduces $2.4 billion debt interest rate by 25 basis points. Exp. to save annual interest expense.
data.description: Aramark, a global company specializing in food and facilities management, has successfully completed a positive repricing for its 2030 Term Loan B, amounting to $2.4 billion. The revised interest rate will now be based on the Secured Overnight Financing Rate (SOFR) plus 175 basis points, showcasing a 25 basis point decrease in pricing. This proactive move is forecasted to result in annual savings on interest expenses, contributing to Aramark's overall capital strategies.

data.title: Todd M. Schneider of Cintas joins PPG board, effective Jan. 14, 2026. Schneider brings 35+ years of experience to the role.
data.description: Pittsburgh-based company PPG disclosed the addition of Todd M. Schneider, current president and CEO of Cintas, to their board of directors. Effective January 14, 2026, Schneider's appointment was confirmed. He will contribute to PPG's Nominating and Governance as well as Sustainability and Innovation committees. With over 35 years of experience at Cintas, Schneider has held various leadership positions before assuming his current roles. This move signifies PPG's focus on strengthening its board with industry expertise.

data.title: Excelerate Energy authorized share repurchase up to $75 million to enhance shareholder returns and allow flexibility for growth.
data.description: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas, Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE), has recently disclosed that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a fresh share repurchase program. Under this authorization, the company is allowed to buy back an amount of up to $75 million worth of its Class A common shares. Dana Armstrong, the Chief Financial Officer of Excelerate, mentioned that this strategy of repurchasing shares is aimed at boosting shareholder returns, all the while ensuring the capability to pursue growth opportunities and divestments.

data.title: Badger Meter makes key executive appointments for innovation & growth. Changes effective from Jan 1, 2026. CEO Ken Bockhorst excited for market expansion in cellular AMI.
data.description: A leading company in smart water management solutions, Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI), headquartered in Milwaukee, revealed a set of executive leadership modifications scheduled to take effect on January 1, 2026. Ken Bockhorst, the Chairman, President, and CEO, expressed his enthusiasm about these changes that aim to support the company's strategic objectives. The adjustments are specifically crafted to enhance the company's dominance in cellular Advanced Metering Infrastructure (AMI).

data.title: TechnipFMC wins significant contract with Chevron for Gorgon Stage 3 project, introduces 7-inch Subsea 2.0® trees.
data.description: In Newcastle and Houston, TechnipFMC (NYSE: FTI) has secured a noteworthy contract from Chevron for the Gorgon Stage 3 brownfield project involving Subsea 2.0® production systems. This deal includes the pioneering 7-inch series of Subsea 2.0® horizontal subsea trees, advancing technologically in the industry. Alongside this, TechnipFMC will supply flexible jumpers aimed at enhancing production levels and ensuring gas flow reliability. President of Subsea at TechnipFMC, Jonathan Landes, expressed enthusiasm for this development.

data.title: Costco Q1 FY26: Net sales $65.98B, up 8.2% YoY; net income $2.001B; comparable sales up 6.4%. Operating income $2.463B.
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corporation reported its operating results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, ending November 23, 2025. The net sales increased by 8.2% to $65.98 billion compared to $60.99 billion last year, with total company comparable sales at 6.4%. Net income for the quarter was $2.001 billion, or $4.50 per diluted share, up from $1.798 billion, or $4.04 per diluted share, last year. Costco currently operates 923 warehouses globally and also runs e-commerce sites in several countries. A conference call to discuss these results was scheduled for December 11, 2025. Their forward-looking statements include various risks and uncertainties related to economic conditions, competition, and others. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Maytag launches sweepstakes to win Pet Pro washer and dryer set. Fans can enter to win the ultimate laundry system on Instagram.
data.description: Today marks the launch of a sweepstakes where fans have the opportunity to win a top-of-the-line Maytag® Pet Pro Washer and Dryer set. The announcement was made by Maytag brand in Benton Harbor, Michigan on December 11, 2025. To enter the sweepstakes, fans can participate through Instagram. This exclusive giveaway showcases the innovative features of the Maytag® Pet Pro washer and dryer set.

data.title: Paralyzed Veterans of America CEO responds to Department of Transportation's increased penalty against American Airlines for unsafe treatment.
data.description: Washington, December 11, 2025 - In response to the Department of Transportation's recent decision to modify its significant penalty directed at American Airlines due to its hazardous and disrespectful handling, Paralyzed Veterans of America's CEO Carl Blake issued a statement. The details of the amended penalty against American Airlines were not explicitly outlined in the news piece.

data.title: Enliven Therapeutics (Nasdaq: ELVN) grants inducement for small molecule therapeutics development.
data.description: Boulder, Colorado, Dec. 11, 2025 - Enliven Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol ELVN, revealed today that they have awarded a significant grant on the same date. Enliven is dedicated to identifying and advancing small molecule therapeutics.
